name: novakai
description: A spatial diagram tool for dev work — drag-and-drop flowcharts with two-way Mermaid sync, themes, and exports.

scripts.novakai:bundle: node tools/novakai/verify/bundle.mjs --root docs/novakai/root.mmd --dir src > docs/novakai/_bundle.mmd.tmp && mv docs/novakai/_bundle.mmd.tmp docs/novakai/_bundle.mmd
scripts.novakai:exports: node tools/novakai/verify/exports-coverage.mjs --map docs/novakai/_bundle.mmd --tsconfig tsconfig.json --src src --allow docs/novakai/curation-allowlist.txt
scripts.novakai:gate: node tools/buildspec/pipeline/extract.mjs --map docs/novakai/_bundle.mmd --tsconfig tsconfig.json --out /tmp/novakai-extracted.mmd && node tools/buildspec/pipeline/gate.mjs --spec docs/novakai/_bundle.mmd --code /tmp/novakai-extracted.mmd
scripts.novakai:drift: npm run novakai:bundle && node tools/novakai/verify/validate.mjs docs/novakai/_bundle.mmd && node tools/novakai/verify/novakai-lint.mjs docs/novakai/_bundle.mmd && npm run novakai:coverage && npm run novakai:exports && npm run novakai:gate && npm run novakai:edges
scripts.novakai:bodies: node tools/buildspec/pipeline/extract.mjs --map docs/novakai/_bundle.mmd --tsconfig tsconfig.json --out /tmp/extracted.mmd && cp /tmp/extracted.bodies.json public/bodies.json && cp /tmp/extracted.calls.json docs/novakai/derived-fn-edges.json
scripts.novakai:ship: node tools/novakai/status/metrics.mjs wrap --event ship -- npm run novakai:ship:steps
scripts.novakai:ship:steps: npm run novakai:bundle && node tools/novakai/verify/validate.mjs docs/novakai/_bundle.mmd && node tools/novakai/verify/novakai-lint.mjs docs/novakai/_bundle.mmd && npm run novakai:coverage && npm run novakai:exports && npm run novakai:gate && npm run novakai:edges && npm run novakai:bodies && node tools/novakai/verify/ship-stamp.mjs && echo 'DONE: map is grammar-valid + structurally sound (lint pass), file-complete (coverage) + symbol-complete (exports) + in sync with code (gate) + edges code-backed-or-audited (edge-verify), bodies.json regenerated from real source, and ship-stamp.json records the src/ content this ship verified.'
scripts.spec:test:all: npm run novakai:bodies && node --test tools/buildspec/pipeline/pipeline.test.mjs tools/buildspec/pipeline/parser-conformance.test.mjs tools/buildspec/core/slice-core.test.mjs tools/buildspec/scaffold/writeback.test.mjs tools/buildspec/testkit/plan-layout.test.mjs tools/buildspec/testkit/plan-from-diff.test.mjs tools/buildspec/acceptance/acceptance.test.mjs tools/novakai/plan/plan-cert.test.mjs tools/novakai/verify/novakai-lint.test.mjs tools/novakai/verify/novakai-lint.discriminate.test.mjs tools/buildspec/core/normtype.test.mjs tools/novakai/verify/edge-verify.test.mjs tools/novakai/verify/fn-edges-triage.test.mjs tools/novakai/plan/plan-check.test.mjs tools/novakai/plan/approve-export.test.mjs tools/novakai/contract/loop-e2e.test.mjs tools/novakai/lib/canonical.test.mjs tools/novakai/contract/contract.test.mjs tools/novakai/contract/verify-change.test.mjs tools/novakai/contract/replay.test.mjs tools/novakai/gates/contract-gate.test.mjs tools/novakai/gates/edit-gate.test.mjs tools/novakai/gates/plan-gate.test.mjs tools/novakai/gates/ship-staleness.test.mjs tools/novakai/contract/waves.test.mjs tools/novakai/status/handoff-fresh.test.mjs tools/novakai/contract/orchestrate.test.mjs tools/novakai/verify/tooling-map.test.mjs tools/novakai/status/roadmap.test.mjs tools/novakai/onboard/quiz.test.mjs tools/novakai/verify/gate-parity.test.mjs tools/novakai/onboard/onboard.test.mjs tools/novakai/verify/cli-wiring.test.mjs tools/novakai/verify/completeness.test.mjs tools/novakai/cli.test.mjs tools/buildspec/pipeline/conformance-strict.test.mjs tools/buildspec/pipeline/extract-calls.test.mjs tools/novakai/status/status.test.mjs tools/novakai/verify/mutate.test.mjs tools/novakai/lib/metrics-log.test.mjs tools/novakai/status/metrics.test.mjs tools/novakai/status/turns.test.mjs tools/novakai/gates/turn-gate.test.mjs tools/novakai/gates/reminder-hook.test.mjs tools/buildspec/testkit/diff.test.mjs && node tools/buildspec/testkit/run-bundled-test.mjs tools/buildspec/testkit/diff-views.test.mjs && node tools/buildspec/testkit/run-bundled-test.mjs tools/buildspec/testkit/diff-roundtrip.test.mjs && node tools/buildspec/testkit/run-bundled-test.mjs tools/buildspec/testkit/viewspec.test.mjs
scripts.novakai:backfill: for f in $(find src -name '*.novakai.mmd'); do node tools/buildspec/scaffold/scaffold.mjs --backfill "$f" --tsconfig tsconfig.json; done
scripts.novakai:tooling:bundle: node tools/novakai/verify/bundle.mjs --root docs/novakai/root-tools.mmd --dir tools > docs/novakai/_tooling.mmd.tmp && mv docs/novakai/_tooling.mmd.tmp docs/novakai/_tooling.mmd
scripts.novakai:tooling:verify: npm run novakai:tooling:bundle && node tools/novakai/verify/validate.mjs docs/novakai/_tooling.mmd && node tools/novakai/verify/novakai-lint.mjs docs/novakai/_tooling.mmd && node tools/novakai/verify/tooling-coverage.mjs && node --test tools/novakai/verify/tooling-map.test.mjs && echo 'DONE: tooling map bundled + grammar-valid + architectural (lint) + complete & symbol-true (tooling-coverage) + deterministic (test).'
scripts.novakai:roadmap:audit: node tools/novakai/status/roadmap.mjs --audit-doc CLAUDE.md && node tools/novakai/status/roadmap.mjs --audit-tree docs --allow docs/novakai/status-ban-allowlist.txt
scripts.novakai:verify: npm run novakai:bundle && node tools/novakai/verify/validate.mjs docs/novakai/_bundle.mmd && node tools/novakai/verify/novakai-lint.mjs docs/novakai/_bundle.mmd && npm run novakai:coverage && npm run novakai:exports && npm run novakai:gate && npm run novakai:edges
scripts.novakai:verify:full: npm run spec:test:all && npm run novakai:verify && npm run novakai:roadmap:audit && npm run novakai:cert -- --plan public/plan.json && npm run novakai:plan-check -- --plan public/plan.json && npm run novakai:acceptance -- --plan public/plan.json && npm run novakai:handoff:check && echo 'DONE: full CI-equivalent gate chain green (spec:test:all + drift + roadmap:audit + cert + plan-check + acceptance + handoff-fresh) — the same suite AND gates spec-gate.yml enforces (F-06).'
